title: Nature Expanded
description: Upgrades almost all of nature in Minecraft to be completely overhauled with over 30 features!
body:
![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c1814b2373032101d35b84530fd3efcb7e33fd4.png)

# Description
This incredible resource pack takes the entirety of nature in minecraft to the next level with over 30 new features that not only change textures, but randomise and adapt them to be more realistic, stylish, and most certainly realistic and immersive!

Immerse yourself with incredible changes ranging from large features such as apples in oak trees, more populous flowers, wheaty tall grass to large rocks in coarse dirt or tiny little mushrooms in mycelium!

That may seem like a lot of features, but trust me, there are a **lot** more where that came from! Take a look at the **gallery** to see (almost) all of them!

(You'll have to find the fossils and the elusive **skeleton fossil** for yourself!

## All of the flower types:

![All flower types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c5737673fc28a3ef9410838ea65b7b41d6d19fe.png)

And that's only one feature!

Have fun immersing yourself with these features:
- Blinking eyes in all log types
- New stick texture
- New ghast texture
- New short grass texture
- New spyglass texture (accuracy)
- New podzol texture
- New vine texture
- New lily pad texture
- New hanging roots texture
- Random mushrooms in mycelium
- Random bones in sand
- Randomised ore textures
- Random rocks in coarse dirt
- Random apples in oak trees
- Random pinecones in spruce trees
- Random clover in grass
- Random stones in grass
- Random wheat on top of tall grass
- Random flowers on cacti
- Rare nautilus fossils in stone
- Extremely rare skeleton fossils in stone
- Bush has a chance of being rosemary
- Amethyst cluster glint animation
- More populous flower textures
- Single flowers when in pots
- Random red mushroom textures
- Random brown mushroom textures
- White foliage in snowy biomes
- Blinking eye of ender
- Random flowers in moss
- Random dead bush textures
